news.title: Global outbreaks may fuel violence against women — but most cases go unmeasured
news.summary_en: At WashU Public Health, researchers highlight how outbreaks strain households and systems, revealing hidden risks for women and girls that data often fails to capture.

news.title: Two WashU Medicine researchers named Perlmutter Career Development Assistant Professors
news.summary_en: Monica Chang-Panesso, MD, and Hysell Oviedo, PhD, were recognized for their research on kidney repair and the brain’s processing of sound and speech, respectively.

news.title: Witt installed as Kavita and Krishna Bharat Professor
news.summary_en: Andrew Witt has been installed as the inaugural Kavita and Krishna Bharat Professor in the WashU Sam Fox School. The professorship includes a joint appointment at WashU McKelvey Engineering.

news.title: WashU Olin Business launches dual AI initiatives to prepare workers, companies
news.summary_en: The school is offering $10,000 scholarships to support affected professionals enrolled in the new AI for Business master’s program, while new corporate development offerings help organizations redesign work and reskill teams.
